---
title: "Evaluation of the European Union Solidarity Fund 2002-2017"
sort_year: 2020
year: "2020"
status: "Past"
funder: "DG Regio Fund Tender (Contract No. 2017CE16AAD011)"
categories: [Applied Political Communication, Past]
---

**Year:** 2020
**Status:** Past
**Funder:** DG Regio Fund Tender (Contract No. 2017CE16AAD011)
**Research Cluster:** Applied Political Communication
